loop1.title: Energy Input & Distribution
loop1.note: Showing total active power and energy for each outgoing feeder; per-feeder utilization is not measured because no rated capacity is available for the GIC-* member meters.

loop1.title: Energy Flow Diagram
loop1.note: Showing energy distribution via roster of PRIMARY members (UPS/BPDB feeders); Solar Incomers and Transformers are dark (no live data) and render as zero/empty nodes in the Sankey flow.
